name: IDEXX Laboratories
analysis: IDXX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $565.1700, stop $542.0943, target $651.5700 (3.74:1) — then trail it.
